name: Bruce Westerman
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $179,638 for Bruce Westerman in U.S. House, AR-04. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
